tasks.name: ocr-validation-spike
tasks.changes_summary: Created standalone OCRSpike Xcode project with VNRecognizeTextRequest integration, word-level bounding boxes, SPIKE_NOTES.md

tasks.name: data-model
tasks.changes_summary: Added CoreData 0.9.0 model version with VocabularyEntry/FamiliarityProgress/FlashcardState entities; CoreDataManager+Vocabulary extension; BackupVocabularyEntry/BackupFamiliarityProgress structs; wired backup create/restore; VocabularyManagerTests

tasks.name: translation-service
tasks.changes_summary: Created TranslationService protocol, FoundationModelsTranslationService, DeepLTranslationService, CompositeTranslationService, CachingTranslationService, TranslationServiceFactory

tasks.name: ocr-service
tasks.changes_summary: Created OCRService protocol, VisionOCRService with VNRecognizeTextRequest, OCRResultCache with NSCache-backed SHA256 keying

tasks.name: reader-overlay
tasks.changes_summary: Added LearnerEvents hub, VocabIndex, LearnerOverlayView (word regions + familiarity badges), LearnerOverlayCoordinator; hooked imageDidLoad into ReaderPageView; wired LearnerPageContext in loadPage; added pageDidBecomeVisible refresh on swipe; Learner section in ReaderSettingsView; 9 unit tests

tasks.name: word-lookup-sheet
tasks.changes_summary: WordLookupSheet (SwiftUI/ObservableObject), WordLookupViewModel, LearnerStrings.normalizeLemma; wired in ReaderViewController via Combine; 5 unit tests in WordLookupViewModelTests; shared TestHelpers.makeInMemoryContainer

tasks.name: sentence-translation
tasks.changes_summary: SentenceTranslationViewModel (ObservableObject, parallel TaskGroup translation, lazy CEFR simplify), SentenceTranslationSheet (NavigationView+ScrollView+DisclosureGroup), long-press on LearnerOverlayView, ocrResult(for:) on coordinator, ReaderViewController sentenceTranslateRequested subscription, 5 unit tests
